title: Agentic Engineering

hero.headline: Modernize complex systems with governed human-and-agent delivery
hero.summary: A practical model for using domain-driven design, modernization patterns, agent orchestration, platform engineering, and governance to accelerate enterprise software modernization without losing control.

proofPoints: Frames agentic engineering as an enterprise operating model, not just coding acceleration
Combines DDD, event storming, modernization patterns, platform engineering, governance, and enablement
Supports advisory, implementation, enablement, and managed evolution offerings
Designed to scale across complex modernization programs and regulated environments

sections.title: Why this matters
sections.body: Most organizations do not need more disconnected AI experiments. They need a governed way to redesign how software is planned, built, delivered, operated, and improved. Agentic engineering becomes valuable when it is tied to architecture, operating model, quality, and business outcomes.

sections.title: What makes this different
sections.body: This model combines human accountability with agent acceleration. It starts with domain understanding and modernization design, then extends through build, release, operations, and continuous evolution. Governance, platform, enablement, and measurement cut across the full lifecycle.
